potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall verify login credentials upon submission.
The system shall display an error message and prevent further interaction if login details are incorrect.
The system shall end the process without further action if the payment fails.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote:
A user starts by logging in.

If the login details are correct, they can access the system. If not, they see an error and cannot continue.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall prompt users to log in.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to save updated information after entering new details.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of updating user information in the source text. The source only mentions viewing or updating their information, but not saving it.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to view products or update their information after a successful login.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is somewhat ambiguous as it does not specify the sequence of actions. The source text clearly states that these are two separate options.
